prompt: Create a hyper-realistic vertical studio portrait of a beautiful young woman centered from mid-torso upward against a clean pale pink-white seamless background. She has very long, straight brown hair falling over both shoulders, with a few strands blowing slightly outward as if in a gentle breeze. She wears a pastel pink baseball cap with a small distinct black spider emblem embroidered on the front, positioned above the forehead. Her face is fully covered by a solid rectangular privacy block in muted dusty rose-brown, placed vertically from just below the cap brim to the lower face, obscuring all facial features. She wears a pastel pink varsity jacket with white sleeves, white striped ribbed trim, shiny silver snap buttons, and a plain white shirt underneath. Use soft even studio lighting, shallow depth of field, natural fabric texture, realistic hair detail, and a polished fashion-photography look. Keep the composition symmetrical and cropped tightly, with the cap, hair, jacket, and privacy rectangle clearly visible; include exactly one embroidered spider logo and one face-obscuring rectangle, with no text or watermark.
